hooks.command: cmd /c python -c "import graphify,json,sys,pathlib; g=pathlib.Path('graphify-out/graph.json'); d=json.load(g.open()) if g.exists() else None; print(f'graphify: {len(d[\"nodes\"])} nodes ready' if d else 'graphify: no graph yet - run /graphify [path] to build')" 2>nul || echo graphify: not installed
